The 80/20 of a useful AI second brain:

Most people make this way too complicated.

You need 3 folders and one schema file.

1. raw/
Dump everything here.

Examples:
- call transcripts
- meeting notes
- screenshots
- SOPs
- bookmarks
- articles
- customer emails
